suspicious_activity.narrative: Customer Tracy Lewis (CUST_0053) exhibited potential structuring activity. High average monthly balances and frequent transactions of varied nature were observed. Notably, a series of large cash deposits were made from July 25-31, 2025, each exceeding $9,000.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: The customer's accounts show high average monthly balances compared to the current balances. The transactions, although not excessively large, are frequent and varied in nature, suggesting a possible structuring scheme to avoid detection.
